creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to software from comment #4)
> (In reply to Dmitry Marakasov from comment #1)
> > Is this still a problem?
> 
> Yes, it is. I removed the patches I wrote and the build again fails.
> 
> Sorry, I cannot exactly remember what I did seven months ago.

It builds for me both with and without network access, it builds fine on cluster, also http://www.oasis-open.org/docbook/xml/4.1.2/docbookx.dtd is available, so the problem is probably not there. Please provide complete build log, your system version, list of installed packages and options set for related ports (xdg-utils, xmlto, libxml2).
